name: Floral Knit Jacquard Throw Blanket Blue/Cream - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Bring warmth to your space with this Floral Knit Jacquard Throw Blanket from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. The jacquard throw blanket features a cream floral pattern on a blue backdrop for a charming look that blends effortlessly with any decor style or color palettes. Made from midweight cotton knitted material, this throw blanket is comfortable to use and is machine washable for easy care.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
